title: IPv4 Addressing, CIDR, VLSM, and Subnet Design · Operations Brief: Net Vlsm Allocation
summary: Create an address plan for departments, infrastructure, guests, point-to-point links, growth, and route summarization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net vlsm allocation increment in a validated IPv4 subnet allocation workbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Allocate largest-to-smallest VLSM networks with growth, infrastructure, alignment, and non-overlap evidence.
Calculate network address, broadcast address, usable host range, prefix length, and address count for CIDR blocks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
